goal: Add a deterministic generator for the BPK governance manifest that deduplicates required CLI commands across BPK contracts and emits JSON-schema-like definitions for the new pre-dispatch governance artifacts. Also normalize the existing builder repo index artifact so the generator check is green again. Do not change runtime dispatch, server routes, package files, or live behavior.
scope_out: Do not add package scripts or dependencies.
Do not change runtime dispatch, server routes, providers, GitHub writes, or frontend.
Do not change WLP verifier behavior.
Do not alter the semantics of the repo-index generator; only normalize its committed artifact if needed.
claims: A deterministic governance manifest can deduplicate required_commands across BPK contracts.
The manifest includes schema definitions for WorkerPacket/WLP draft, card-conditioned dispatch, and pre-registered claims artifacts.
The manifest generator supports check mode and fails when the committed manifest is stale.
The existing builder repo index artifact is normalized so its existing check passes again.
assumptions: BPK-003, BPK-004, and BPK-005 are committed and available as local contracts.
No package change is needed because the generator can be invoked directly with node.
Repo-index artifact normalization is a generated-artifact update, not a runtime behavior change.
dod: The manifest deduplicates required_commands and lists which BPK tasks use each command.
The manifest contains schema definitions for the new governance artifacts.
builder/data/builder-repo-index.json is normalized so node scripts/generate-repo-index.mjs --check passes.
builder/tests/bpkGovernanceManifest.test.ts covers manifest shape and check mode.
review-packets/BPK-006.md records scope, generator outputs, gates, and verification.

npx tsx --test tests/bpkGovernanceManifest.test.ts, node scripts/generate-bpk-governance-manifest.mjs --check, node scripts/generate-repo-index.mjs --check, npm run typecheck, node tools/verify-task-lock.cjs BPK-006 --verify, and git diff --check pass.
stop_conditions: A package or dependency change becomes necessary.
A runtime dispatch, server route, provider, GitHub, database, maya-core, or frontend change becomes necessary.
Changing WLP verifier behavior becomes necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-003 through BPK-005 introduced pure pre-dispatch governance artifacts. BPK-006 should make their CLI/check surface deduplicated and generated, and fix the existing generated repo-index artifact drift.
